---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see added.

## Use Case
Describe the use case or problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
If you have an idea of how this could be implemented, describe it here.

## Examples
Provide code examples or mockups if applicable.

## Related to Existing Issues
Is this related to any existing issues? Link them here.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Additional Context
Add any other context or information about the feature request.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks current usage)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (polish/nice future addition)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] This feature would benefit multiple users
- [ ] I can provide clear use cases
